rationale: Ukraine reclaiming territory and intensifying strikes on Russian logistics is a qualitative shift directly relevant to Romania's Black Sea security environment.

top_events.title: Ukraine reclaims territory, doubles attacks on Russian logistics
top_events.summary: A qualitative shift in the war bordering Romania; Ukrainian advances could alter Black Sea dynamics and refugee/migration flows relevant to Romanian residents.

top_events.title: France-Germany jet plans crash: Can Europe end reliance on US for security?
top_events.summary: EU defense fragmentation continues; Romania's NATO-dependent security posture is indirectly affected by weakening European defense cooperation.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Iran deal stalemate keeps mild energy price uncertainty alive for Romania. No structural change this cycle.
